Evil Dead Rise (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $67,356,372Details
International Box Office $79,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $147,256,372
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $948,535
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,846,034
Total $2,794,569
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Moving the action out of the woods and into the city, “Evil Dead Rise” tells a twisted tale of two estranged sisters, played by Sutherland and Sullivan, whose reunion is cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,504,315 (36.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,402 opening theaters/3,417 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $73,636,404

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 21st, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: April 19th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
April 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
April 20th, 2023 (Wide) (Netherlands)
April 20th, 2023 (Wide), released as La casa - Il risveglio del male (Italy)
April 20th, 2023 (Wide), released as A Morte Do Demônio: A Ascensão (Brazil)
Video Release: May 9th, 2023 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody horror violence and gore, and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2724 (cert #53707), 3/23/2022)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Franchise: Evil Dead
Filming location (country): New Zealand
Plot point: Possessed
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Renaissance Films, Pacific Renaissance, Wild Atlantic Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
